notes: NWT 2023 season; mandatory evacuation ordered 16–17 Aug 2023 as Behchokǫ̀/Yellowknife fire approached the city (North Slave complex).
Rhodes wildfire ignited 18 Jul 2023; rapid spread in meltemi winds; major evacuations; strong Sentinel signal late Jul 2023 (e.g. EMSN159 / NASA Worldview 26 Jul).

region: Butte County CA (Park Fire, Upper Bidwell Park / east of Chico)
notes: CAL FIRE incident: ignition ~2024-07-24 near Upper Park Rd; became largest CA wildfire of 2024; centroid per incident reporting.
Aug 2023 EU-record complex; major smoke and burn signal around Alexandropolis and Dadia forest (Aug 19–29 active phase).
Feb 2024 Chilean wildfires; extreme losses in Valparaíso region; drought + heatwave; among deadliest fire episodes in Chilean history.
Wind-driven urban–interface firestorm Aug 2023; extreme EO contrast pre/post in West Maui.
Parks Canada: lightning-ignited complex from ~22 Jul 2024; town evacuation Jul 2024; includes North/South/Utopia fires (Miette area).
May 2023 Halifax-area interface wildfires (Tantallon / Hammonds Plains); major Canadian Atlantic season episode.
Largest Texas wildfire on record; GOES / CIMSS first detection ~26 Feb 2024; origin near Stinnett; crossed into OK.
